entities.name: SN76489
entities.description: 3-channel square wave + 1-channel noise PSG chip. Found in Sega Master System, Game Gear, and early Genesis.

entities.name: SN76489 Application Manual
entities.description: Official technical documentation for the SN76489 chip hardware and timings.

invariants.name: PSG Amplitude Quantization
invariants.description: 2dB attenuation steps enforce a geometric volume ramp (logarithmic), simplifying software EG calculation.
